prompt:
Subject: a magical girl controlling a fire dragon / fire dragon magic 

Character and Expression: A young woman with reddish-brown hair, translucent skin, a cute expression with a soft smile, ornate Japanese-style hair accessories, natural eye contact with the camera, and a bright, confident atmosphere. 

Clothing and Pose: A Japanese-style fantasy fire-attribute magical girl outfit based on white, vermilion, orange, and gold, featuring translucent sleeves, a large ribbon on the chest, a flashy layered skirt, a decorative obi ribbon, and lace-up short boots. She is in a supple, dance-like full-body pose, with one arm raised high to guide fire and the other arm stretched forward to manipulate flames. On her shoulder sits a cute chibi version of herself, wearing a different red frilled outfit, energetically casting fire magic along with her.

Background and Lighting: An old Japanese street after rain, a stone-paved alley in Kyoto, wooden architecture, warm lantern light, a silhouette like a five-story pagoda in the background, and a fantastic night view with the light of the fire reflecting on the wet ground. Vivid flames swirl around, and a massive, powerful fire dragon appears behind her in a great surge, with sparks and particles dancing in the air.

Composition and Camera: Vertical composition, full-body portrait, character centered, low angle emphasizing dynamism, a composition where the fire dragon wraps around from overhead, 35mm to 50mm natural field of view, background slightly blurred, character and flames expressed sharply.

Texture and Style: High definition, 4K quality, realistic skin texture where pores and grain look natural, photorealistic Japanese fantasy portrait, flames depicted with rich three-dimensionality using deep orange and red luminous expressions, precise details down to the dragon's outline and scale flow, reflections on wet cobblestones, translucency of the outfit and sparkling gold decorations, cinematic lighting, magazine-style finish.

Negative: Low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, strange eye contact, asymmetrical eyes, collapsed face, distorted body, broken clothes, broken shoes, unnatural flames, unnatural fire dragon, messy sparks, duplicate characters, chibi version facial collapse, excessive processing, excessive skin correction, AI-specific unnatural texture, text, logo, watermark.
